---
title: "GIS & Remote Sensing Research Associate"
description: "Led GIS-based analysis assessing spatial patterns and land-use impacts on community and regional risk management."
org: "University of Florida"
org-url: "https://www.victoriamdonovan.org/"
date: "2025-08-01"
dates: "Aug 2025 – Present"
location: "Milton, FL"
categories: [Experience]
---

::: {.nw-detail-lead}
<a class="nw-tl-org" href="https://www.victoriamdonovan.org/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">University of Florida</a> · Aug 2025 – Present · Milton, FL
:::

Working in the Donovan Lab at the University of Florida, I lead GIS and remote sensing analyses that examine how spatial patterns and land-use change shape community and regional risk. My work translates large geospatial datasets into decision-ready products for land managers and emergency planners.

- Built reproducible spatial workflows for landscape-scale analysis of land-use and risk.
- Integrated remote sensing and vector data to characterize the wildland-urban interface.
- Produced maps and visualizations that communicate risk to non-technical stakeholders.
